summary: Issue #259 continuation: GitHub issue context was updated with the TikTok OAuth token persistence flow, and TikTokCredentialRepo now encrypts access/refresh tokens before database persistence while keeping existing repo callers on plaintext token values. No blocking findings; targeted tests and lints pass.

interfaceChanges.description: Repository create/update now writes encrypted token values; get_by_shop/get_latest/update_tokens continue returning plaintext token attributes for existing callers.
Adds token encryption/decryption helpers with enc:v1 prefix and legacy plaintext read compatibility.

mappings.criterion: Callback URL exists at /v1/auth/tiktok/callback and handles review callback safely
Missing or invalid code/state returns controlled response, not 5xx
Server does not expose access/refresh tokens in callback response
OAuth callback provisions shop and encrypted credentials
OAuth callback persists credentials for verify connection
Env examples do not contain real secrets

recommendations: Before production key rotation, add a migration/re-encryption runbook for existing enc:v1 credential rows.
If merchant_connections becomes the canonical table name, scope a dedicated schema migration instead of aliasing it in this App Review fix.
